verses.text: Moses in Israel-te khempeuh samin amaute kiangah, “Israel-te aw, tuni-a note' zakin kong gen thukhamte leh ngeina kipte ngai un la, note in thei-in limtakin zuih ding na ngaihsun ding uh hi
Topa i Pasian in eite tawh Horeb-ah thuciamna khat bawl hi
Topa in i pute i pate bek tawh hih thuciamna a bawl hiloin, tuni-a a hinglai eite khempeuh tawh zong a bawl ahi hi

Note' tungah Topa' thu a gen dingin Topa leh note' kikalah ka din' laitakin, mei sung panin tua mualah Topa in kimaituahin note hong hopih a, mei hangin note lau na hih manun mualtungah na paito kei uh hi. Amah in
“‘Kei pen salsuahna Egypt leitang panin note a hong paikhiatpih Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi
“‘Keimah longal pasian dang na nei kei ding uh hi
“‘A kiseek milim hita leh, tunga vantung hita leh, nuai-a leitung hita leh, leinuai-a om tui sung hita lehah a om na khat peuhpeuh a sun khat peuhpeuh note-a' dingin na bawl kei ding uh hi

Amaute' mai-ah kunloin, amau' na na sem kei ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh keimah Topa note' Pasian, a aam Pasian ka hi a, kei hong mudahte' tungah a pate' mawhna a tate' tungah khang thum khang lina dongin thuk-in
ahih hangin kei hong itin ka thupiakte a zui mi a tul tampite' tungah itna kip a lakpa ka hi hi
“‘ Topa note' Pasian' min a sia lamin na zang kei ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in ama min a sia lamin a zang mi a mawhlo hi, cilo ding hi
“‘ Topa note' Pasian in hong thupiak bangin na sian'thosakna dingun Sabbath ni tang un
Ni guk sung na semin na nasep ding khempeuh uh na hih ding uh hi

Ahih hangin a ni sagih ni pen Topa note' Pasian' Sabbath ni ahi hi. Tua ni-in note bangin na nasem numei leh na nasem pasalte uh a tawlngak theihna dingin note, na tapate, na tanute, na nasemnute, na nasempate, na bawngtal, na la, na ganhing khat peuhpeuh uh leh na huang sung uha om zinte in na khat peuhpeuh semlo ding uh hi

Egypt-ah nasem na hihna uh leh tua lai panin Topa na Pasian un a vangliatna khut leh a thahatna tawh hong paikhiatpihna na phawk ding uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin Sabbath ni na tan' ding uh Topa note' Pasian in thu hong pia hi
“‘ Topa note' Pasian in hong piak leitang tungah na khan' uh sau-in na nopsak theihna dingun Topa note' Pasian in hong thupiak bangin na nu na pa uh zahtak un
“‘Mi na that kei ding uh hi
“‘Nulepa mawhna zong na bawl kei ding uh hi
“‘Na na gu kei ding uh hi
“‘Na vengte uh langkhatah zong a manloin teci na pang kei ding uh hi
“‘Na vengte uh zi zong na deihgawh kei ding uh hi. Na vengte' inn, a lo, a nasempa, a nasemnu, a bawngtal, a la, ahih kei leh na vengte' na khat peuhpeuh na deihgawh kei ding uh hi,’ ci hi

“ Topa in mei, meii, leh a mial mahmah sung panin awging lianpi tawh mualtunga no a kikhawm khempeuh tungah hih thute hong gen a, amah in bangmah dang genthuahlo hi. Amah in suangpeek nih tungah tuate gelhin, tua suangpeekte kei tungah hong pia hi.
“Mei in mual a kat laitakin khuamial sung panin awging na zak uh ciangin minam lutang khempeuh leh upate kei kiangah hong pai uh hi
Note in, ‘En in, Topa i Pasian in a minthan'na leh a liatna eite' tungah hong lak khin a, mei sung panin ama awging i za khin hi. Pasian in mi hopih napi, mi a hinglai veve-in tuni-in i mu hi
Tua ahih ciangin bang hangin tu-in eite si ding ihi hiam? Hih mei lianpi in eite hong kangtum ding hi. Topa i Pasian' awging za lai lehang eite i si ding hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh a si thei mihing khempeuh sung panin eite' zak bangin mei sung panin a nungta Pasian a paukhiatna awging za-in a nungta lai kua om ahi hiam
A nai-ah va pai in la, Topa i Pasian in a gen ding khempeuh va za in. Topa i Pasian in nang tungah hong genteng ko' tungah nang hong gensawn in. Kote in hong mangin ka sem ding uh hi,’ nong ci uh hi
“Kei kiangah nong gen uh ciangin Topa in na thu uh a za hi. Topa in kei kiangah, ‘Hih mite in nang kiangah hong gen uh thu ka za khin a, a gen khempeuh uh a manin gen uh hi
Amaute leh a suan a khakte uh a nopsak tawntung theihna dingun keimah zahtak ding leh ka thupiak khempeuh zuih ding hih bang ngaihsutna nei tawntung le-uh ka deih ahi hi
Pai in la amaute kiangah, “Na puanbuk uhah ciah un,” ci in

Ahih hangin nang, kei kiang hih lai-ah ding in. Amaute' neih dingin ka piak leitangah amaute in a zuih theihna dingun amaute na hilh ding thupiakna leh thukhamte leh ngeina kipte khempeuh nang tungah kong gen ding hi,’ hong ci hi
“Tua ahih ciangin Topa na Pasian un note hong thupiak bangin na gamtat ding uh na kingaihsun ding uh a, ama thu panin taklam hita leh veilam hita lehah na pial kei ding uh hi
Note nungta-in, nuamsa-in na luah ding uh leitangah sawtpi na nuntakna dingun Topa na Pasian un note hong thupiakna lampi khempeuh na tawn ding uh hi.
